meaning: n.[生]小囊,[解](内耳迷路中的球囊)
examples: When the compliant material is used, the top end saccule can be used to expand the bracket.
The utility model relates to a neurosurgery device, comprising a latex saccule and a working pipe.
The saccule enlarges and expands gradually over time until it presents as a paralaryngeal or submandibular mass.
